subcodes.first_line: O Perfumer of the musk-laden fragrance! Scatter thy sweet-scented offering, that the breaths of mysteries may shed their ambergris upon the nostrils of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار نافه مشکبار نثار کن تا نفحه اسرار مشام یاران را عنبرافشان کند هر
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
